sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n70609" key="newteristiko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">νεωτερ-ιστικός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n70609.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">given to innovation,</tr_> esp. in language, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ῥήτωρ</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:4:36" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.36</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
